subcodes.first_line: …postoje također neke svete dužnosti djece prema roditeljima, te su dužnosti upisane u Božjoj knjizi jer pripadaju Bogu.
subcodes.notes: NOT a prayer. Croatian extract about children's duties toward parents: "...there also exist certain sacred duties of children toward parents, duties inscribed in God's Book; the progress of children in this world and the Kingdom depends on the satisfaction of parents." Compilation extract from Tablets.
